Obj_arg1.Name: Disable Items?
Obj_arg1.Description: If set, no items will drop.

Obj_arg2.Name: Show Ground Flower?
Obj_arg2.Description: If set, the Pokey's flower will appear in the ground.

Obj_arg3.Name: Hitback Velocity
Obj_arg3.Description: The velocity in which it launches backwards upon being hit. Default is -100.

SW_AWAKE.Description: Enables rendering and resumes updates when this switch is active.
